task_completion.description: Open and read the observing plan
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'lsb_imaging_plan.txt'.

task_completion.description: Configure the CCD for active cooling
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekos CCD module or INDI Control Panel showing the cooler is turned on (active) and the target temperature is set to -20 C.
The Ekos Capture module or CCD settings showing the Binning (X and Y) is set to 2x2.

task_completion.description: Execute the imaging sequence as specified in the plan
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekos Capture module showing a sequence job in the queue or running, with target 'Malin 1', filter 'Luminance', exposure '300' seconds, and count '4'.
A file manager or terminal window showing the presence of FITS files and 'malin1_sky.png' in the '/home/ga/Images/lsb/malin1' directory, and 'malin1_report.txt' in the '/home/ga/Documents' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to configure the CCD and execute the sequence.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the KStars/Ekos interface, not just terminal commands spoofing the output files.

integrity.description: The generated artifacts appear to be genuine files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FITS files, sky capture PNG, and report TXT are visible in a file manager or opened in an application, indicating they are real files with content and not empty placeholders.

integrity.description: The agent read the observing plan to obtain the parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a screenshot showing the agent opening 'lsb_imaging_plan.txt' before configuring the sequence, proving it didn't use prior knowledge of the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: Malin 1. Required settings: Luminance filter, 300-second exposure, 2x2 binning, active cooling to -20C, exactly 4 images. Output artifacts: 4 FITS files and 'malin1_sky.png' in '/home/ga/Images/lsb/malin1', and 'malin1_report.txt' in '/home/ga/Documents'.
